title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Hicksville, NY | $900 - $2,500 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Hicksville, Long Island. Humane bat control, attic cleanup, and prevention. Licensed experts. Call for fast service!
intro: Hicksville homeowners and businesses facing bat infestations need professional help to safely remove these protected mammals and prevent their return. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive bat removal and exclusion services throughout Hicksville, from the historic Broadway Mall area to residential neighborhoods near Cantiague Park. Our certified technicians provide humane bat control solutions that comply with all New York State wildlife regulations.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over 15 years of bat exclusion expertise to Hicksville, using proven one-way door systems and permanent sealing techniques that guarantee bats won't return. Our licensed wildlife specialists understand Long Island's unique bat species and provide thorough attic inspections, safe guano cleanup, and restoration services with upfront pricing and no hidden fees.
localContext: Hicksville's mix of mid-century homes, split-level houses, and commercial buildings near the LIRR station often provide ideal entry points for Little Brown Bats and Big Brown Bats seeking roost sites. The tree-lined streets around Old Country Road and the older structures throughout the community frequently experience bat intrusions in attics, soffits, and roof vents, especially during spring and fall migration periods.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Hicksville typically range from $900 to $2,500 depending on the colony size, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes full inspection, humane exclusion using one-way doors, sealing all entry points, and initial cleanup. Additional costs may apply for extensive guano removal or attic restoration.

faqs.question: Is bat removal legal in Hicksville, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, but bat removal in New York must follow strict regulations. Bats are protected species and cannot be harmed or removed during maternity season (roughly May 1 - August 15) when flightless young are present. Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane exclusion methods that comply with all state and federal wildlife protection laws.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have bats in my Hicksville home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include squeaking or scratching sounds at dusk or dawn, dark stains near entry points, accumulation of guano (droppings) in attics or on exterior walls, and seeing bats emerge from your home at sunset. Many Hicksville homeowners first notice bats flying around their roofline during evening hours between April and October.

faqs.question: How long does the bat exclusion process take?
faqs.answer: The complete bat exclusion process typically takes 3-5 days for installation of one-way exclusion devices, followed by a 3-7 day monitoring period to ensure all bats have left. After confirming the colony has vacated, we permanently seal all entry points. The entire process usually takes 1-2 weeks, though larger infestations may require additional time.
